0.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in the peripheral paramediastinal area of the superior segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in the mediobasal segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Ground glass opacities in the bilateral lower lobes with areas of increased consolidation

6.text: Subpleural bands in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung
